properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're the God of this city You're the King of these people You're the Lord of this nation You are

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You're the light in this darkness You're the hope to the hopeless You're the peace to the restless You are

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is no one like our God There is no one like our God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done in this city Greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done in this city

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're the Lord of creation The Creator of all things You're the King above all kings You are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You're the strength in our weakness You're the love to the broken You're the joy in the sadness You are

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There is no one like our God There is no one like our God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: For greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done in this city Greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done in this city

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done here

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: There is no one like our God There is no one like you, God

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: For greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done in this city Greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: We believe, we believe in you, God

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done in this city Greater things have yet to come And greater things are still to be done here Greater things, still to be done here Ooh
